# shareWithUI

**Instance Method**

Presents a UI to the user which lets them share a record with other users.

## Declaration

```swift
Promise<CloudKit.SharingUIResult, CloudKit.CKError> shareWithUI(
	Object options
);
```

## Parameters

- **options**: A dictionary containing options for the share UI:



## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to an object that represents the share record, or rejects to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.
title: shareWithUI
